WITH max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
windowed_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    ww.period_label,
    SUM(ww.weekly_mg) AS period_sales,
    AVG(ww.weekly_mg) AS period_weekly_avg
  FROM (
    SELECT
      d.week_end_date,
      CASE
        WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 12 WEEK) AND m.max_week_end_date THEN 'R13W'
        WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK) AND DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 13 WEEK) THEN 'P13W'
        ELSE NULL
      END AS period_label,
      SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg) AS weekly_mg
    FROM data_867 d
    CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK)
    GROUP BY
      d.week_end_date,
      CASE
        WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 12 WEEK) AND m.max_week_end_date THEN 'R13W'
        WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK) AND DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 13 WEEK) THEN 'P13W'
        ELSE NULL
      END
    HAVING period_label IS NOT NULL
  ) ww
  GROUP BY ww.period_label
),
growth_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN period_sales END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_r13w,
    CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_sales END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_p13w,
    CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_r13w_weekly_avg,
    CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_p13w_weekly_avg,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) = 0
               AND MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) = 0
               AND MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE
            ROUND(
              (
                (
                  MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'R13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END)
                  - MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END)
                )
                / NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN period_label = 'P13W' THEN period_weekly_avg END), 0)
              ) * 100,
              0
            )
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS `growth_r13w_vs_p13w%`
  FROM windowed_weeks_cte
)
SELECT
  sales_r13w,
  sales_p13w,
  sales_r13w_weekly_avg,
  sales_p13w_weekly_avg,

),
prior_month_bounds_cte AS (

    LEAST(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(recent_month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)), max_date) AS prior_month_end
  FROM recent_month_bounds_cte
),
recent_month_weekly_sums_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg) AS weekly_sum_rytelo_total_mg_recent_month
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN recent_month_bounds_cte b
    ON d.`date` >= b.recent_month_start

  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
weekly_avg_and_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT

    AVG(p.weekly_sum_rytelo_total_mg_prior_month) AS prior_weekly_avg_mg

    DATE_FORMAT(max_date, '%Y-%m-01') AS start_of_recent_month,
    max_date AS end_of_recent_month_in_data
  FROM max_date_cte
),
prior_month_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_SUB(start_of_recent_month, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS start_of_prior_month,
    LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(start_of_recent_month, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS end_of_prior_month
  FROM recent_month_bounds_cte

recent_month_weekly_sums_cte AS (

    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg) AS weekly_sum_rytelo_total_mg_recent_month
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN recent_month_bounds_cte b
    ON d.`date` BETWEEN b.start_of_recent_month AND b.end_of_recent_month_in_data
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
prior_month_weekly_sums_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.week_end_date,
    SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg) AS weekly_sum_rytelo_total_mg_prior_month
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN prior_month_bounds_cte b
    ON d.`date` BETWEEN b.start_of_prior_month AND b.end_of_prior_month
  GROUP BY d.week_end_date
),
recent_month_weekly_avg_cte AS (
  SELECT

),
prior_month_weekly_avg_cte AS (

WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT MIN(d.quarter_year) AS recent_quarter_year
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
    ON d.week_end_date = m.max_week_end_date
),
prior_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CONCAT(
      'Q',
      CASE
        WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(r.recent_quarter_year, 2, 1) AS UNSIGNED) = 1 THEN 4
        ELSE CAST(SUBSTRING(r.recent_quarter_year, 2, 1) AS UNSIGNED) - 1
      END,
      '-',
      LPAD(
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(r.recent_quarter_year, 2, 1) AS UNSIGNED) = 1
            THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(r.recent_quarter_year, 4, 2) AS UNSIGNED) - 1
          ELSE CAST(SUBSTRING(r.recent_quarter_year, 4, 2) AS UNSIGNED)
        END,
        2,
        '0'
      )
    ) AS prior_quarter_year
  FROM recent_quarter_cte r
),
quarter_sales_pivot_cte AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(r.recent_quarter_year) AS recent_quarter_year_label,
    MAX(p.prior_quarter_year) AS prior_quarter_year_label,
    CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = r.recent_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_mg_recent_quarter,
    CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = p.prior_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_mg_prior_quarter,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = p.prior_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0

        WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = p.prior_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0
             AND COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = r.recent_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0
          THEN 0
        ELSE (
          (
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = r.recent_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0)
            - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.quarter_year = p.prior_quarter_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END), 0)

        ) * 100
      END AS SIGNED
    ) AS growth_percent_int

  CROSS JOIN recent_quarter_cte r
  CROSS JOIN prior_quarter_cte p

WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (

latest_month_weeks_cte AS (

),
latest_month_included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    week_end_date
  FROM latest_month_weeks_cte
  WHERE overlap_end >= overlap_start
    AND (DATEDIFF(overlap_end, overlap_start) + 1) >= 3
),
latest_month_complete_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.latest_month_year,
    CASE
      WHEN (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM latest_month_included_weeks_cte
      ) = (
        SELECT COUNT(*)
        FROM data_867 d2
        WHERE d2.month_year = b.latest_month_year
      )
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS is_complete
  FROM latest_month_bounds_cte b
),
most_recent_complete_month_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN c.is_complete = 1 THEN c.latest_month_year
      ELSE (
        SELECT d.month_year
        FROM data_867 d
        WHERE d.month_year <> c.latest_month_year
        ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', d.month_year), '%d-%y-%b') DESC
        LIMIT 1
      )
    END AS recent_month_year
  FROM latest_month_complete_cte c
),
prior_month_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.recent_month_year,
    (
      SELECT d.month_year
      FROM data_867 d
      WHERE STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', d.month_year), '%d-%y-%b') <
            STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', r.recent_month_year), '%d-%y-%b')
      ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', d.month_year), '%d-%y-%b') DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ) AS prior_month_year
  FROM most_recent_complete_month_cte r
),
month_bounds_cte AS (
  SELECT
    recent_month_year,
    prior_month_year,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', recent_month_year), '%d-%y-%b') AS recent_month_start,
    LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', recent_month_year), '%d-%y-%b')) AS recent_month_end,
    STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', prior_month_year), '%d-%y-%b') AS prior_month_start,
    LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('01-', prior_month_year), '%d-%y-%b')) AS prior_month_end
  FROM prior_month_cte

    CAST(nt.nation_sales_recent_month AS SIGNED) AS nation_sales_recent_month,
    CAST(nt.nation_sales_prior_month AS SIGNED) AS nation_sales_prior_month,
    (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_recent_month FROM nation_weekly_avgs_cte) AS nation_weekly_sales_recent_month,
    (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_prior_month FROM nation_prior_weekly_avgs_cte) AS nation_weekly_sales_prior_month,
    CASE
      WHEN (SELECT week_count_recent FROM period_week_counts_cte) <> (SELECT week_count_prior FROM period_week_counts_cte)
      THEN
        CASE
          WHEN (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_prior_month FROM nation_prior_weekly_avgs_cte) = 0
               AND (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_recent_month FROM nation_weekly_avgs_cte) > 0
            THEN 100
          WHEN (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_prior_month FROM nation_prior_weekly_avgs_cte) = 0
            THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            (((SELECT nation_weekly_sales_recent_month FROM nation_weekly_avgs_cte) - (SELECT nation_weekly_sales_prior_month FROM nation_prior_weekly_avgs_cte))
              / NULLIF((SELECT nation_weekly_sales_prior_month FROM nation_prior_weekly_avgs_cte), 0)
            ) * 100 AS SIGNED
          )
        END
      ELSE
        CASE
          WHEN CAST(nt.nation_sales_prior_month AS SIGNED) = 0 AND CAST(nt.nation_sales_recent_month AS SIGNED) > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN CAST(nt.nation_sales_prior_month AS SIGNED) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(
            ((CAST(nt.nation_sales_recent_month AS SIGNED) - CAST(nt.nation_sales_prior_month AS SIGNED))
              / NULLIF(CAST(nt.nation_sales_prior_month AS SIGNED), 0)
            ) * 100 AS SIGNED
          )
        END
    END AS nation_growth_recent_month_pct_int
  FROM nation_totals_cte nt
),
region_vs_nation_flag_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    CASE
      WHEN r.growth_recent_month_pct_int > n.nation_growth_recent_month_pct_int THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation
  FROM region_metrics_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_metrics_cte n
)
SELECT
  r.campus_region AS campus_region,
  r.sales_recent_month AS sales_recent_month,
  CONCAT(ROUND(r.growth_recent_month_pct_int, 0), '%') AS growth_recent_month_pct,
  r.sales_prior_month AS sales_prior_month,
  MAX(n.nation_sales_recent_month) AS nation_sales_recent_month,
  CONCAT(ROUND(MAX(n.nation_growth_recent_month_pct_int), 0), '%') AS nation_growth_recent_month_pct,
  MAX(n.nation_sales_prior_month) AS nation_sales_prior_month,
  f.performance_vs_nation AS performance_vs_nation
FROM region_metrics_cte r
CROSS JOIN nation_metrics_cte n
JOIN region_vs_nation_flag_cte f
  ON r.campus_region = f.campus_region
GROUP BY
  r.campus_region,
  r.sales_recent_month,
  r.growth_recent_month_pct_int,
  r.sales_prior_month,
  f.performance_vs_nation
ORDER BY r.sales_recent_month DESC;

      WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 25 WEEK) AND DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 13 WEEK) THEN 'P13W'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS period_flag

    SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_flag = 'P13W' THEN p.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_p13w
  FROM period_flags_cte p
  WHERE p.period_flag IN ('R13W', 'P13W')

),
nation_period_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_flag = 'R13W' THEN p.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_r13w_nation,
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.period_flag = 'P13W' THEN p.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_p13w_nation
  FROM period_flags_cte p
  WHERE p.period_flag IN ('R13W', 'P13W')
),
growth_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    CAST(r.sales_r13w AS SIGNED) AS sales_r13w,
    CAST(r.sales_p13w AS SIGNED) AS sales_p13w,
    CAST(n.sales_r13w_nation AS SIGNED) AS sales_r13w_nation,
    CAST(n.sales_p13w_nation AS SIGNED) AS sales_p13w_nation,
    CASE
      WHEN r.sales_p13w = 0 AND r.sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN r.sales_p13w = 0 AND r.sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((r.sales_r13w - r.sales_p13w) / NULLIF(r.sales_p13w, 0)) * 100, 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS growth_r13w_pct_int,
    CASE
      WHEN n.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN n.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((n.sales_r13w_nation - n.sales_p13w_nation) / NULLIF(n.sales_p13w_nation, 0)) * 100, 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS nation_growth_r13w_pct_int
  FROM region_period_agg_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_period_agg_cte n
)
SELECT

  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.r13w_start AND w.r13w_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_r13w,

  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN window_bounds_cte w
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.p13w_start AND w.r13w_end
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_period_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN w.r13w_start AND w.r13w_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS sales_r13w_nation,

),
growth_calculations_cte AS (

        CASE
          WHEN r.sales_p13w = 0 AND r.sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN r.sales_p13w = 0 AND r.sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((r.sales_r13w - r.sales_p13w) / NULLIF(r.sales_p13w, 0)) * 100, 0)
        END AS SIGNED
      ),

    ) AS growth_r13w_vs_p13w_percent,

          WHEN n.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND n.sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((n.sales_r13w_nation - n.sales_p13w_nation) / NULLIF(n.sales_p13w_nation, 0)) * 100, 0)

            WHEN r.sales_p13w = 0 AND r.sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(((r.sales_r13w - r.sales_p13w) / NULLIF(r.sales_p13w, 0)) * 100, 0)

question: Which regions are driving quarterly performance?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
rolling_52w_base_cte AS (
  SELECT d.*
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN max_week_end_date_cte m
  WHERE d.week_end_date >= DATE_SUB(m.max_week_end_date, INTERVAL 51 WEEK)
    AND d.week_end_date <= m.max_week_end_date
),
quarter_windows_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    MIN(`date`) AS quarter_start_date,
    MAX(`date`) AS quarter_end_date
  FROM rolling_52w_base_cte
  GROUP BY quarter_year
),
quarter_week_inclusion_cte AS (
  SELECT
    b.*,
    qw.quarter_start_date,
    qw.quarter_end_date,
    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(b.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), qw.quarter_start_date) AS overlap_start_date,
    LEAST(b.week_end_date, qw.quarter_end_date) AS overlap_end_date
  FROM rolling_52w_base_cte b
  JOIN quarter_windows_cte qw
    ON qw.quarter_year = b.quarter_year
),
included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    *
  FROM quarter_week_inclusion_cte
  WHERE
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(overlap_end_date, overlap_start_date) + 1
    ) >= 3
),
region_quarter_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    campus_region,
    CAST(SUM(rytelo_total_mg) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_mg
  FROM included_weeks_cte
  GROUP BY quarter_year, campus_region
),
nation_quarter_agg_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    CAST(SUM(rytelo_total_mg) AS SIGNED) AS nation_quarterly_sales_mg
  FROM included_weeks_cte
  GROUP BY quarter_year
),
quarter_order_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    quarter_start_date,
    quarter_end_date,
    COUNT(DISTINCT week_end_date) AS weeks_in_quarter_included
  FROM included_weeks_cte
  GROUP BY quarter_year, quarter_start_date, quarter_end_date
),
latest_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.quarter_year AS latest_quarter_year,
    q.quarter_start_date AS latest_quarter_start_date,
    q.quarter_end_date AS latest_quarter_end_date,
    q.weeks_in_quarter_included AS latest_quarter_weeks_included
  FROM quarter_order_cte q
  JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(quarter_end_date) AS max_quarter_end_date
    FROM quarter_order_cte
  ) mx
    ON mx.max_quarter_end_date = q.quarter_end_date
),
region_quarter_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    i.quarter_year,
    i.campus_region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.week_end_date) AS region_weeks_in_quarter_included
  FROM included_weeks_cte i
  GROUP BY i.quarter_year, i.campus_region
),
region_qoq_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rqa.quarter_year,
    rqa.campus_region,
    rqa.quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(LAG(rqa.quarterly_sales_mg) OVER (
      PARTITION BY rqa.campus_region
      ORDER BY qo.quarter_start_date
    ) AS SIGNED) AS region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(LAG(rqw.region_weeks_in_quarter_included) OVER (
      PARTITION BY rqa.campus_region
      ORDER BY qo.quarter_start_date
    ) AS SIGNED) AS region_prior_quarter_weeks_included,
    rqw.region_weeks_in_quarter_included AS region_current_quarter_weeks_included,
    CASE
      WHEN rqa.quarter_year = (SELECT latest_quarter_year FROM latest_quarter_cte) THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_latest_quarter
  FROM region_quarter_agg_cte rqa
  JOIN quarter_order_cte qo
    ON qo.quarter_year = rqa.quarter_year
  JOIN region_quarter_weeks_cte rqw
    ON rqw.quarter_year = rqa.quarter_year
   AND rqw.campus_region = rqa.campus_region
),
region_qoq_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    campus_region,
    quarterly_sales_mg,
    region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN is_latest_quarter = 1
           AND region_current_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND region_prior_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND region_current_quarter_weeks_included <> region_prior_quarter_weeks_included
      THEN CAST(ROUND(quarterly_sales_mg / NULLIF(region_current_quarter_weeks_included, 0)) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED)
    END AS region_current_basis_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN is_latest_quarter = 1
           AND region_current_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND region_prior_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND region_current_quarter_weeks_included <> region_prior_quarter_weeks_included
      THEN CAST(ROUND(region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg / NULLIF(region_prior_quarter_weeks_in_quarter_included, 0)) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED)
    END AS region_prior_basis_mg
  FROM (
    SELECT
      quarter_year,
      campus_region,
      quarterly_sales_mg,
      region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
      region_current_quarter_weeks_included,
      region_prior_quarter_weeks_included,
      is_latest_quarter,
      region_prior_quarter_weeks_included AS region_prior_weeks_in_quarter_included
    FROM region_qoq_cte
  ) x
),
region_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    campus_region,
    quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED) AS region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN region_prior_basis_mg IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN region_prior_basis_mg = 0 AND region_current_basis_mg > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN region_prior_basis_mg = 0 AND region_current_basis_mg = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((region_current_basis_mg - region_prior_basis_mg) / NULLIF(region_prior_basis_mg, 0)) * 100) AS SIGNED)
    END AS region_growth_quarterly_pct_num
  FROM region_qoq_calc_cte
),
nation_qoq_cte AS (
  SELECT
    nqa.quarter_year,
    nqa.nation_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(LAG(nqa.nation_quarterly_sales_mg) OVER (
      ORDER BY qo.quarter_start_date
    ) AS SIGNED) AS nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(LAG(qo.weeks_in_quarter_included) OVER (
      ORDER BY qo.quarter_start_date
    ) AS SIGNED) AS nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included,
    qo.weeks_in_quarter_included AS nation_current_quarter_weeks_included,
    CASE
      WHEN nqa.quarter_year = (SELECT latest_quarter_year FROM latest_quarter_cte) THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_latest_quarter
  FROM nation_quarter_agg_cte nqa
  JOIN quarter_order_cte qo
    ON qo.quarter_year = nqa.quarter_year
),
nation_qoq_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    nation_quarterly_sales_mg,
    nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN is_latest_quarter = 1
           AND nation_current_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND nation_current_quarter_weeks_included <> nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included
      THEN CAST(ROUND(nation_quarterly_sales_mg / NULLIF(nation_current_quarter_weeks_included, 0)) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(nation_quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED)
    END AS nation_current_basis_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN is_latest_quarter = 1
           AND nation_current_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included IS NOT NULL
           AND nation_current_quarter_weeks_included <> nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included
      THEN CAST(ROUND(nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg / NULLIF(nation_prior_quarter_weeks_included, 0)) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED)
    END AS nation_prior_basis_mg
  FROM nation_qoq_cte
),
nation_growth_cte AS (
  SELECT
    quarter_year,
    nation_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CAST(nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg AS SIGNED) AS nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
    CASE
      WHEN nation_prior_basis_mg IS NULL THEN NULL
      WHEN nation_prior_basis_mg = 0 AND nation_current_basis_mg > 0 THEN 100
      WHEN nation_prior_basis_mg = 0 AND nation_current_basis_mg = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(((nation_current_basis_mg - nation_prior_basis_mg) / NULLIF(nation_prior_basis_mg, 0)) * 100) AS SIGNED)
    END AS nation_growth_quarterly_pct_num
  FROM nation_qoq_calc_cte
),
contribution_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rqa.quarter_year,
    rqa.campus_region,
    CASE
      WHEN nqa.nation_quarterly_sales_mg IS NULL THEN NULL
      ELSE CAST(ROUND((rqa.quarterly_sales_mg / NULLIF(nqa.nation_quarterly_sales_mg, 0)) * 100) AS SIGNED)
    END AS contribution_quarterly_pct_num
  FROM region_quarter_agg_cte rqa
  JOIN nation_quarter_agg_cte nqa
    ON nqa.quarter_year = rqa.quarter_year
),
vs_nation_flag_cte AS (
  SELECT
    rg.quarter_year,
    rg.campus_region,
    CASE
      WHEN rg.region_growth_quarterly_pct_num > ng.nation_growth_quarterly_pct_num THEN 'Higher'
      ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS vs_nation
  FROM region_growth_cte rg
  JOIN nation_growth_cte ng
    ON ng.quarter_year = rg.quarter_year
)
SELECT
  rg.quarter_year,
  rg.campus_region,
  rg.quarterly_sales_mg,
  rg.region_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
  CASE
    WHEN rg.region_growth_quarterly_pct_num IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE CONCAT(CAST(rg.region_growth_quarterly_pct_num AS SIGNED), '%')
  END AS region_growth_quarterly_pct,
  ng.nation_quarterly_sales_mg,
  ng.nation_prior_quarterly_sales_mg,
  CASE
    WHEN ng.nation_growth_quarterly_pct_num IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE CONCAT(CAST(ng.nation_growth_quarterly_pct_num AS SIGNED), '%')
  END AS nation_growth_quarterly_pct,
  CASE
    WHEN c.contribution_quarterly_pct_num IS NULL THEN NULL
    ELSE CONCAT(CAST(c.contribution_quarterly_pct_num AS SIGNED), '%')
  END AS contribution_quarterly_pct,
  v.vs_nation
FROM region_growth_cte rg
JOIN nation_growth_cte ng
  ON ng.quarter_year = rg.quarter_year
JOIN contribution_cte c
  ON c.quarter_year = rg.quarter_year
 AND c.campus_region = rg.campus_region
JOIN vs_nation_flag_cte v
  ON v.quarter_year = rg.quarter_year

ORDER BY

included_weeks_prior_month_cte AS (

    mc.prior_month_year,

    GREATEST(

        GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), mc.recent_month_start)
      ) + 1
    ) AS overlap_days_recent,
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(
        LEAST(d.week_end_date, mc.prior_month_end),
        GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), mc.prior_month_start)

  GROUP BY mc.recent_month_year, mc.prior_month_year, d.week_end_date, mc.recent_month_start, mc.recent_month_end, mc.prior_month_start, mc.prior_month_end

  SELECT
    w.recent_month_year,
    w.prior_month_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.overlap_days_recent >= 3 THEN w.week_sales ELSE 0 END) AS recent_included_sales,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN w.overlap_days_recent >= 3 THEN w.week_end_date END) AS recent_included_weeks,
    SUM(CASE WHEN w.overlap_days_prior >= 3 THEN w.week_sales ELSE 0 END) AS prior_included_sales,

  FROM month_completeness_cte mc
  JOIN monthly_totals_cte mt
    ON mt.recent_month_year = mc.recent_month_year

  JOIN weekly_normalized_cte wn
    ON wn.recent_month_year = mc.recent_month_year
   AND wn.prior_month_year = mc.prior_month_year
)
SELECT
  ma.recent_month_year AS month_year_recent,
  ma.prior_month_year AS month_year_prior,
  ma.monthly_sales_recent_month,
  ma.monthly_sales_prior_month,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      ROUND(
        CASE
          WHEN ma.monthly_sales_prior_month = 0 AND ma.monthly_sales_recent_month > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN ma.monthly_sales_prior_month = 0 AND ma.monthly_sales_recent_month = 0 THEN 0

        END,

  ) AS `mom_growth_recent_month_%`

    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_month_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_month_complete,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_month_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_month_complete
  FROM prior_month_calendar_cte p

           AND DATEDIFF(

    MAKEDATE(YEAR(r.recent_quarter_start_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY), 1)
      + INTERVAL (QUARTER(r.recent_quarter_start_date - INTERVAL 1 DAY) - 1) QUARTER AS prior_quarter_start_date
  FROM recent_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte r
),
quarter_completeness_flags_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_quarter_complete_flag,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_quarter_end_date THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_quarter_complete_flag
  FROM prior_quarter_calendar_bounds_cte p
),
weekly_inclusion_recent_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
             0,
             DATEDIFF(
               LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.recent_quarter_end_date),
               GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.recent_quarter_start_date)
             ) + 1
           ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS included_flag
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags_cte q
),
weekly_inclusion_prior_quarter_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    CASE
      WHEN GREATEST(
             0,
             DATEDIFF(
               LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end_date),
               GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start_date)
             ) + 1
           ) >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS included_flag
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date FROM data_867) w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_completeness_flags_cte q
),
normalized_or_total_quarter_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    q.recent_quarter_complete_flag,
    q.prior_quarter_complete_flag,
    CASE
      WHEN q.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND q.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1 THEN 'total_quarterly_sales'
      ELSE 'weekly_average'
    END AS basis_used,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN q.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND q.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1 THEN
          (
            SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg), 0)
            FROM data_867 d
            WHERE d.quarter_year = q.recent_quarter_year_label
          )
        ELSE
          (
            (
              SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg), 0)
              FROM data_867 d
              JOIN weekly_inclusion_recent_quarter_cte wi
                ON wi.week_end_date = d.week_end_date
              WHERE wi.included_flag = 1
            ) / NULLIF(
              (
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                FROM weekly_inclusion_recent_quarter_cte wi
                WHERE wi.included_flag = 1
              ),
              0
            )
          )
      END AS SIGNED
    ) AS recent_basis_sales,
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN q.recent_quarter_complete_flag = 1 AND q.prior_quarter_complete_flag = 1 THEN
          (
            SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg), 0)
            FROM data_867 d
            WHERE d.quarter_year = CONCAT('Q', QUARTER(q.prior_quarter_end_date), '-', DATE_FORMAT(q.prior_quarter_end_date, '%y'))
          )
        ELSE
          (
            (
              SELECT COALESCE(SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg), 0)
              FROM data_867 d
              JOIN weekly_inclusion_prior_quarter_cte wi
                ON wi.week_end_date = d.week_end_date
              WHERE wi.included_flag = 1
            ) / NULLIF(
              (
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                FROM weekly_inclusion_prior_quarter_cte wi
                WHERE wi.included_flag = 1
              ),
              0
            )
          )
      END AS SIGNED
    ) AS prior_basis_sales
  FROM quarter_completeness_flags_cte q
),
growth_calculation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    n.recent_quarter_complete_flag,
    n.prior_quarter_complete_flag,
    n.basis_used,
    n.recent_basis_sales,
    n.prior_basis_sales,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.prior_basis_sales = 0 AND n.recent_basis_sales > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN n.prior_basis_sales = 0 AND n.recent_basis_sales = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE CAST(ROUND(((n.recent_basis_sales - n.prior_basis_sales) / NULLIF(n.prior_basis_sales, 0)) * 100, 0) AS SIGNED)
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter_pct
  FROM normalized_or_total_quarter_sales_cte n
)
SELECT
  g.recent_basis_sales AS quarterly_sales_recent_quarter,
  g.prior_basis_sales AS quarterly_sales_prior_quarter,
  g.growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter_pct AS `growth_recent_quarter_vs_prior_quarter_%`,
  g.basis_used AS `basis_used (total_quarterly_sales_or_weekly_average)`,
  g.recent_quarter_complete_flag AS recent_quarter_complete_flag,
  g.prior_quarter_complete_flag AS prior_quarter_complete_flag
FROM growth_calculation_cte g;

question: Compare the growth in Q3'25 with Q4'25?

max_week_end_date_cte AS (

complete_totals_cte AS (

    d.quarter_year,
    SUM(d.rytelo_total_mg) AS total_sales
  FROM data_867 d

),
distinct_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
normalized_week_assignment_cte AS (

          LEAST(w.week_end_date, qc.period_end),
          GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), qc.period_start)
        ) + 1) >= 3
  JOIN data_867 d
    ON d.week_end_date = w.week_end_date
   AND d.quarter_year IN ('Q3-25','Q4-25')
  WHERE qc.quarter_year IN ('Q3-25','Q4-25')
  GROUP BY qc.quarter_year
),
comparison_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(qc.is_complete) = 2 THEN 'total_sales'
      ELSE 'weekly_avg_sales'
    END AS basis_used_label,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(qc.is_complete) = 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN ct.quarter_year = 'Q3-25' THEN ct.total_sales END), 0) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN nw.quarter_year = 'Q3-25' THEN nw.total_sales END), 0) / NULLIF(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN nw.quarter_year = 'Q3-25' THEN nw.included_weeks END), 0), 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_q3_25,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(qc.is_complete) = 2 THEN CAST(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN ct.quarter_year = 'Q4-25' THEN ct.total_sales END), 0) AS SIGNED)
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN nw.quarter_year = 'Q4-25' THEN nw.total_sales END), 0) / NULLIF(IFNULL(MAX(CASE WHEN nw.quarter_year = 'Q4-25' THEN nw.included_weeks END), 0), 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_q4_25
  FROM quarter_completeness_cte qc
  LEFT JOIN complete_totals_cte ct
    ON ct.quarter_year = qc.quarter_year
  LEFT JOIN normalized_week_assignment_cte nw

)
SELECT

    ),

question: What is the sales performance in the recent month?

trace.text:
WITH
max_week_end_date_cte AS (
  SELECT MAX(week_end_date) AS max_week_end_date
  FROM data_867
),
recent_month_boundaries_cte AS (
  SELECT
    max_week_end_date,
    DATE_SUB(max_week_end_date, INTERVAL (DAYOFMONTH(max_week_end_date) - 1) DAY) AS recent_month_start,
    LAST_DAY(max_week_end_date) AS recent_month_end
  FROM max_week_end_date_cte
),
prior_month_boundaries_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.max_week_end_date,
    r.recent_month_start,
    r.recent_month_end,
    DATE_SUB(r.recent_month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS prior_month_start,
    LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(r.recent_month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AS prior_month_end
  FROM recent_month_boundaries_cte r
),
period_completeness_cte AS (
  SELECT
    p.*,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_month_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS recent_month_complete,
    CASE WHEN p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_month_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS prior_month_complete,
    CASE
      WHEN (p.max_week_end_date >= p.recent_month_end) AND (p.max_week_end_date >= p.prior_month_end) THEN 0
      ELSE 1
    END AS normalization_required
  FROM prior_month_boundaries_cte p
),
week_list_cte AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT d.week_end_date
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    ON d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(pc.prior_month_start, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND pc.recent_month_end
),
week_inclusion_cte AS (
  SELECT
    wl.week_end_date,
    pc.recent_month_start,
    pc.recent_month_end,
    pc.prior_month_start,
    pc.prior_month_end,
    pc.normalization_required,
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(
        LEAST(wl.week_end_date, pc.recent_month_end),
        GREATEST(DATE_SUB(wl.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), pc.recent_month_start)
      ) + 1
    ) AS overlap_days_recent_month,
    GREATEST(
      0,
      DATEDIFF(
        LEAST(wl.week_end_date, pc.prior_month_end),
        GREATEST(DATE_SUB(wl.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), pc.prior_month_start)
      ) + 1
    ) AS overlap_days_prior_month
  FROM week_list_cte wl
  CROSS JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
),
included_weeks_cte AS (
  SELECT
    w.week_end_date,
    w.normalization_required,
    CASE WHEN w.normalization_required = 1 AND w.overlap_days_recent_month >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS include_recent_week,
    CASE WHEN w.normalization_required = 1 AND w.overlap_days_prior_month >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS include_prior_week
  FROM week_inclusion_cte w
),
included_week_strings_cte AS (
  SELECT
    GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN include_recent_week = 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') END ORDER BY week_end_date SEPARATOR ',') AS recent_month_included_week_end_dates,
    GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN include_prior_week = 1 THEN DATE_FORMAT(week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') END ORDER BY week_end_date SEPARATOR ',') AS prior_month_included_week_end_dates,
    SUM(include_recent_week) AS recent_included_weeks,
    SUM(include_prior_week) AS prior_included_weeks
  FROM included_weeks_cte
),
month_year_cte AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(pc.recent_month_start, '%y-%b') AS recent_month_year,
    DATE_FORMAT(pc.prior_month_start, '%y-%b') AS prior_month_year
  FROM period_completeness_cte pc
),
complete_month_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.month_year = my.recent_month_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_recent_month_total,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.month_year = my.prior_month_year THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_prior_month_total
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN month_year_cte my
  WHERE d.month_year IN (my.recent_month_year, my.prior_month_year)
),
incomplete_month_sales_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_recent_week = 1 THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_recent_month_included_weeks,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN iw.include_prior_week = 1 THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS sales_prior_month_included_weeks
  FROM data_867 d
  JOIN included_weeks_cte iw
    ON d.week_end_date = iw.week_end_date
  JOIN period_completeness_cte pc
    ON 1=1
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(pc.prior_month_start, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND pc.recent_month_end
),
sales_aggregation_cte AS (
  SELECT
    pc.normalization_required,
    CASE WHEN pc.normalization_required = 0 THEN 'total_month_sales' ELSE 'weekly_average_sales' END AS comparison_basis,

    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = 0 THEN cms.sales_recent_month_total
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(ims.sales_recent_month_included_weeks / NULLIF(iws.recent_included_weeks, 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_recent_month,

    CASE
      WHEN pc.normalization_required = 0 THEN cms.sales_prior_month_total
      ELSE CAST(ROUND(ims.sales_prior_month_included_weeks / NULLIF(iws.prior_included_weeks, 0), 0) AS SIGNED)
    END AS sales_prior_month,

    iws.recent_month_included_week_end_dates,
    iws.prior_month_included_week_end_dates
  FROM period_completeness_cte pc
  CROSS JOIN included_week_strings_cte iws
  CROSS JOIN complete_month_sales_cte cms
  CROSS JOIN incomplete_month_sales_cte ims
)
SELECT
  s.sales_recent_month AS sales_recent_month,
  s.sales_prior_month AS sales_prior_month,
  CONCAT(
    CAST(
      CASE
        WHEN s.sales_prior_month = 0 AND s.sales_recent_month > 0 THEN 100
        WHEN s.sales_prior_month = 0 AND s.sales_recent_month = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE CAST(ROUND(((s.sales_recent_month - s.sales_prior_month) / NULLIF(s.sales_prior_month, 0)) * 100, 0) AS SIGNED)
      END AS SIGNED
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS `growth_recent_month_vs_prior_month%`,
  s.comparison_basis AS comparison_basis,
  s.recent_month_included_week_end_dates AS recent_month_included_week_end_dates,
  s.prior_month_included_week_end_dates AS prior_month_included_week_end_dates
FROM sales_aggregation_cte s;

WITH

p13w_window_cte AS (

nation_sales_cte AS (

        ELSE ROUND(((rs.sales_r13w - rs.sales_p13w) * 100) / NULLIF(rs.sales_p13w, 0), 0)
      END AS SIGNED
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS `growth_r13w_vs_p13w%`,

        WHEN ns.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND ns.sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE ROUND(((ns.sales_r13w_nation - ns.sales_p13w_nation) * 100) / NULLIF(ns.sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0)
      END AS SIGNED
    ),

  ) AS `growth_r13w_vs_p13w_nation%`,
  CASE
    WHEN

        CASE
          WHEN rs.sales_p13w = 0 AND rs.sales_r13w > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN rs.sales_p13w = 0 AND rs.sales_r13w = 0 THEN 0

        END AS SIGNED
      )
      >
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN ns.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND ns.sales_r13w_nation > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN ns.sales_p13w_nation = 0 AND ns.sales_r13w_nation = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ROUND(((ns.sales_r13w_nation - ns.sales_p13w_nation) * 100) / NULLIF(ns.sales_p13w_nation, 0), 0)

    )) AS prior_complete,

  SELECT
    q.max_week_end_date,
    q.current_quarter_start,
    q.current_quarter_end,
    q.prior_quarter_start,
    q.prior_quarter_end,
    q.current_complete,
    q.prior_complete,
    q.both_complete,
    q.quarter_year_current,
    q.quarter_year_prior,
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN DATE_FORMAT(w.week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
      END
      ORDER BY w.week_end_date SEPARATOR ','
    ) AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.current_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.current_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS included_week_count_current_qtr,
    GROUP_CONCAT(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN DATE_FORMAT(w.week_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d')
      END
      ORDER BY w.week_end_date SEPARATOR ','
    ) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
             <= LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end)
         AND (DATEDIFF(
                LEAST(w.week_end_date, q.prior_quarter_end),
                GREATEST(DATE_SUB(w.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), q.prior_quarter_start)
              ) + 1) >= 3
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS included_week_count_prior_qtr
  FROM weeks_scoped_cte w
  CROSS JOIN quarter_year_labels_cte q
  GROUP BY
    q.max_week_end_date, q.current_quarter_start, q.current_quarter_end,
    q.prior_quarter_start, q.prior_quarter_end, q.current_complete, q.prior_complete, q.both_complete,
    q.quarter_year_current, q.quarter_year_prior
),
region_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    d.campus_region,
    MAX(wi.quarter_year_current) AS quarter_year_current,
    MAX(wi.quarter_year_prior) AS quarter_year_prior,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_current_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS comparison_basis_sales_current,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_prior_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS comparison_basis_sales_prior,
    MAX(wi.included_week_end_dates_current_qtr) AS included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    MAX(wi.included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr) AS included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr,
    MAX(wi.both_complete) AS both_complete_flag
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN week_inclusion_cte wi
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end
  GROUP BY d.campus_region
),
nation_quarter_metrics_cte AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS nation_quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS nation_quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.current_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.current_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.current_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_current_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS nation_comparison_basis_sales_current,
    CAST(
      IF(
        MAX(wi.both_complete) = 1,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.prior_quarter_end THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0 END),
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                 <= LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end)
             AND (DATEDIFF(
                    LEAST(d.week_end_date, wi.prior_quarter_end),
                    GREATEST(DATE_SUB(d.week_end_date, INTERVAL 6 DAY), wi.prior_quarter_start)
                  ) + 1) >= 3
            THEN d.rytelo_total_mg ELSE 0
          END
        ) / NULLIF(MAX(wi.included_week_count_prior_qtr), 0)
      ) AS SIGNED
    ) AS nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior,
    MAX(wi.both_complete) AS both_complete_flag
  FROM data_867 d
  CROSS JOIN week_inclusion_cte wi
  WHERE d.week_end_date BETWEEN wi.prior_quarter_start AND wi.current_quarter_end
),
final_calc_cte AS (
  SELECT
    r.campus_region,
    r.quarter_year_current,
    r.quarter_year_prior,
    r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
    r.quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((r.comparison_basis_sales_current - r.comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(r.comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS growth_qoq_pct,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        (
          CASE
            WHEN r.both_complete_flag = 1 THEN (r.quarterly_sales_current_qtr / NULLIF(n.nation_quarterly_sales_current_qtr, 0)) * 100
            ELSE (r.comparison_basis_sales_current / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current, 0)) * 100
          END
        ) AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS region_contribution_pct,
    CONCAT(
      CAST(
        CASE
          WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
          WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current - n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
        END AS SIGNED
      ),
      '%'
    ) AS nation_growth_qoq_pct,
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          CASE
            WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN r.comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND r.comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((r.comparison_basis_sales_current - r.comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(r.comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
        >
        (
          CASE
            WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current > 0 THEN 100
            WHEN n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior = 0 AND n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ((n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_current - n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior) / NULLIF(n.nation_comparison_basis_sales_prior, 0)) * 100
          END
        )
      THEN 'Higher' ELSE 'Lower'
    END AS performance_vs_nation,
    CASE WHEN r.both_complete_flag = 1 THEN 'Total Sales' ELSE 'Weekly Average' END AS normalization_basis,
    r.included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
    r.included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr
  FROM region_quarter_metrics_cte r
  CROSS JOIN nation_quarter_metrics_cte n
)
SELECT
  campus_region,
  quarter_year_current,
  quarter_year_prior,
  quarterly_sales_current_qtr,
  quarterly_sales_prior_qtr,
  growth_qoq_pct,
  region_contribution_pct,
  nation_growth_qoq_pct,
  performance_vs_nation,
  normalization_basis,
  included_week_end_dates_current_qtr,
  included_week_end_dates_prior_qtr
FROM final_calc_cte
ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(region_contribution_pct, '%', '') AS SIGNED) DESC;

    AND d.date <= '2026-01-31'
  GROUP BY d.campus_id
)
